description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6 Docker image with a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs the exact commands npm install and npm run test. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs npm install, then npm run build, then moves the generated public directory to _public with mv public _public and renames the build directory to public with mv build public, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is configured to run only on the master branch, while also using the same node_modules/ cache.
